brand_identity.name: Aurum Quant
brand_identity.description: Premium automated trading infrastructure for serious investors. High-frequency precision meets institutional reliability.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Landing, Mode B for Dashboard sections)

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#B5952F] font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-6 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full px-8 py-6 backdrop-blur-md

cards.classes: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-2xl shadow-xl hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-colors duration-300

charts.style: Minimalist, gradient fills, hide grid lines or make them very subtle (#1E293B)

navigation.classes: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 z-50 flex items-center gap-6

visual_enhancers.gradients: Radial gradient overlays (gold/blue) to create depth in dark backgrounds
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border with 10% opacity white, creating a 'cut glass' look
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows matching the accent color (e.g., gold glow behind gold buttons)

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds; use #020617 or #0A0A0A.
Do NOT use standard blue for links; use Gold or Electric Blue.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA standards).
Use 'Inter' for body text but 'Playfair Display' for Headings to convey luxury.
Glassmorphism effects must have a 1px border (white/10) to define edges.
Use generous padding (py-24, py-32) between sections.
Interactive elements must have clear hover states (brightness up or glow).
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Hero' section with the provided background image and a parallax effect.
Build the 'Equity Curve' chart using Recharts with a gold gradient stroke.
Ensure the 'Recent Trades' table looks like a Bloomberg terminal (dense but legible, mono font).
Add a 'Risk Management' section emphasizing low drawdown (key for institutional trust).
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections.
